entities.name: semaglutide
entities.context: pharmaceutical compositions combining a GLP-1 receptor agonist with sodium N-(8-(2-hydroxybenzoyl)amino)caprylate (SNAC) for oral administration

entities.name: SNAC
entities.context: SNAC is an absorption enhancer that enables oral delivery of peptide therapeutics by transiently increasing gastric epithelial permeability

entities.name: liraglutide
entities.context: The GLP-1 agonists specifically discussed include semaglutide and liraglutide.

entities.name: oral semaglutide tablet
entities.context: Semaglutide is formulated as oral tablets containing 300 mg SNAC with 3 mg, 7 mg, or 14 mg semaglutide... marketed as Rybelsus

entities.name: orforglipron
entities.context: Next-generation oral approaches include small-molecule nonpeptide GLP-1 agonists (orforglipron, danuglipron)

entities.name: danuglipron
entities.context: small-molecule nonpeptide GLP-1 agonists (orforglipron, danuglipron) that do not require absorption enhancers

entities.name: octanoic acid
entities.context: The related caprylic acid backbone has the identifier WWZKQHOCKIZLMA-UHFFFAOYSA-N (octanoic acid)

entities.name: oral peptide absorption enhancement

attributes.mechanism: localized pH increase, pepsin protection, transcellular absorption in stomach

entities.context: SNAC overcomes these barriers by creating a localized pH increase around the tablet, protecting semaglutide from pepsin degradation, and facilitating transcellular absorption primarily in the stomach

entities.name: Rybelsus
entities.context: This oral formulation is marketed as Rybelsus.

entities.name: intestinal epithelium
entities.context: poor passive permeability across the intestinal epithelium

relations.evidence: The GLP-1 agonists specifically discussed include semaglutide and liraglutide.
pharmaceutical compositions combining a GLP-1 receptor agonist with sodium N-(8-(2-hydroxybenzoyl)amino)caprylate (SNAC) for oral administration
SNAC overcomes these barriers by creating a localized pH increase around the tablet, protecting semaglutide from pepsin degradation, and facilitating transcellular absorption primarily in the stomach
This oral formulation is marketed as Rybelsus.
The related caprylic acid backbone has the identifier WWZKQHOCKIZLMA-UHFFFAOYSA-N (octanoic acid)
